title: Front Desk Operations Excellence
description: Master the core skills of hotel front desk operations including check-in, check-out, reservation management, and delivering exceptional guest experiences.

lessons.title: The Perfect Check-In Experience
lessons.description: Step-by-step guide to welcoming guests, verifying reservations, assigning rooms, and creating a memorable first impression.

lessons.title: Smooth Check-Out & Billing
lessons.description: Handling check-outs efficiently, resolving billing queries, and leaving guests with a positive final impression.

lessons.title: Handling Reservations and Cancellations
lessons.description: Best practices for managing bookings, modifications, cancellations, and no-shows using PMS systems.

lessons.title: Upselling Rooms and Services
lessons.description: Techniques for upselling room upgrades, packages, and ancillary services at check-in to increase revenue.

title: Food & Beverage Service Fundamentals
description: Comprehensive training on restaurant and banquet service standards, menu knowledge, table etiquette, and handling guest dietary requirements in a hospitality setting.

lessons.title: Table Setup and Service Sequence
lessons.description: Learn proper table setup, cover layouts, and the correct sequence of service for fine dining and casual restaurants.

lessons.title: Handling Guest Dietary Requirements
lessons.description: How to identify, communicate, and accommodate allergies, intolerances, and special dietary preferences safely.

lessons.title: Setting Up for Banquet Events
lessons.description: Room layout, linen setup, buffet arrangement, and coordination with kitchen and events team for large-scale functions.

lessons.title: Managing Service During Peak Hours
lessons.description: Strategies for maintaining service quality, managing queues, and coordinating teams during high-volume service periods.

title: Housekeeping Standards and Procedures
description: Professional housekeeping training covering room cleaning procedures, linen management, guest privacy, lost and found, and maintaining brand cleanliness standards.

lessons.title: Standard Room Cleaning Procedure
lessons.description: Step-by-step room cleaning sequence including bed making, bathroom sanitation, amenity replenishment, and quality checks.

lessons.title: Turndown Service and Guest Preferences
lessons.description: Evening turndown procedures, personalising the guest experience, and respecting do-not-disturb requests.
